title: Wano Splits Between Udon and the Flower Capital
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Luffy, Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Hyogoro, Unknown person #11, Raizo as The Wano rebellion spreads between Udon prison, the Flower Capital, and the first shocks around Komurasaki and Orochi.
scene: The rebellion’s pieces scatter across Wano while Luffy struggles in Udon and Orochi’s court grows unstable in the Flower Capital.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Wano Country: UDon - The Prisoner Mines

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Beat the metal!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Move the rocks!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: As well as the weapons factory...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you won't work, at least go die in a corner somewhere so you don't block the way!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: whereze...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: whereze...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: This is all I get...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: For a whole day's worth of work...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You get one piece of kibi-Dango for moving five big rock blocks.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Are you having trouble earning enough food...

dialogue.speaker: Hyogoro
dialogue.text: As you're getting older, Grandpa Hyogorou...!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You're finally about to kick the bucket!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: GYAAH!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: talking back to a guard comes with the punishment of amputation. You know that, don't you!?

dialogue.speaker: Hyogoro
dialogue.text: Grandpa Hyogorou!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't go against them and just preserve your strength!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Otherwise, you'll die!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Next!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Oooh!! Four exchange coupons!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Good work. Here's four kibi- Dangos.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Hmm!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Move, move, move, move!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you're in my way!! I'll kill you all if you don't move!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Nuuua a AaggGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGGG

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Wait, wait, this ship can't hold any more rocks!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Then hurry up and bring another ship!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You snails!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How many rocks have they carried so far?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: We counted up to 500, and then...

dialogue.speaker: Raizo
dialogue.text: What about the Seastone Cuffs!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: They're still shackled in them!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THE'RE ABLE TO DO THIS WITH THEIR POWER DEPLETEED?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What would they be capable of without those shackles...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We moved the rocks. Now hand over the food!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: WhAAA AAAAT!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I moved one more than you did!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How many did they move to get so much Kibi- Dango!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: you idiot!! I'm the one who pulled ahead of you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't mess with me!! You didn't pull ahead at all, jagged- guy"! You bastard!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do you know how to count!? You dumb monkey bastard!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Those two were seriously injured, weren't they...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "They've been working, eating, then sleeping... and with that, they healed up in just a few days...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: What's with their bodies!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How the hell are we supposed to break their spirits!? Say something!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: FU... fully chew your food before you swallow!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Are you their mother!!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Uwood Ooooh!!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon and Flower Capital storyline with 49 dialogue beats. Luffy’s prison struggle, Big Mom’s amnesia, and the Flower Capital drama show Wano’s rebellion becoming harder to control.
